TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Taracan, title = Taracan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Taracan} }

S.FORM: alang Taracan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 292 buwan, 737 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 36% kyan ku 269 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 64% kyan ku 468 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 34%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Taracan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Taracan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Taracan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Taracan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Taracan hya' ga Lidaw. tay 'zil na Taracan hya' ga Isawalian pahikukian. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Taracan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 292 buwan, 737 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 36% kyan ku 269 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 64% kyan ku 468 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 34%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Taracan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Taracan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Taracan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Taracan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Taracan hya' ga Lidaw. tay 'zil na Taracan hya' ga Isawalian pahikukian. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ taraʦ~ʨan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ʦ~ʨiʔan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na taraʦ~ʨan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na taraʦ~ʨan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na taraʦ~ʨan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na taraʦ~ʨan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na taraʦ~ʨan ħjaʔ ɣa li*aw. taj ʔzil na taraʦ~ʨan ħjaʔ ɣa is~ɕawalian paħikukian. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
